# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', description: 'URL of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'PRODUCTION_SERVER', description: 'Production server to deploy the artifact')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Downloading artifact from ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                    sh "curl -O ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactName = params.ARTIFACT_URL.tokenize('/').last()
                    echo "Deploying ${artifactName} to ${params.PRODUCTION_SERVER}"
                    
                    // You might use SCP, SSH, or another method suitable to your infrastructure.
                    sh """
                        scp ${artifactName} user@${params.PRODUCTION_SERVER}:/path/to/deployment/
                        ssh user@${params.PRODUCTION_SERVER} 'deploy_command /path/to/deployment/${artifactName}'
                    """
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
